gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف أو مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/46)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف أو مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/46)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِنَّ لِلْقَائِمِ ( عليه السلام ) غَيْبَةً قَبْلَ أَنْ يَقُومَ قُلْتُ وَ لِمَ قَالَ إِنَّهُ يَخَافُ وَ أَوْمَأَ بِيَدِهِ إِلَى بَطْنِهِ يَعْنِي الْقَتْلَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ja’far Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Muawiya, from Abdullah Bin Jabala, from Abdullah Bin Bukeyr, from Zurara who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘For Al-Qaim<sup>asws</sup> there would be an absence (Occultation) before his<sup>asws</sup> rising’. I said, ‘And why (would that be so)?’ He<sup>asws</sup> he<sup>asws</sup> would fear’, and he<sup>asws</sup> gestured by his<sup>asws</sup> hand towards his<sup>asws</sup> belly, meaning the murder’.
en.sarwar: 9. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ja’far ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Mu‘awiya from ‘Abdallah ibn Jabala from ‘Abdallah ibn Bukayr from Zurara who has said the following. “I heard abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) say as herein below. “The person who will rise to Divine power on earth will disappear from the public sight before he will do so.” I then asked, “Why, will happen so?” He said, “He will be afraid.” He then pointed to his midsection meaning thereby being murderd.”
